<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8" />
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0" />
<title>Younas Khan — Executive Profile</title>
<link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com">
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Space+Grotesk:wght@500;600;700&family=IBM+Plex+Sans:wght@400;500;600;700&family=IBM+Plex+Mono:wght@500;600&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<style>
  :root{
    --bg:#0a121f;
    --panel:#111b2d;
    --panel-soft:#0e1726;
    --line:rgba(255,255,255,0.08);
    --line-soft:rgba(255,255,255,0.05);
    --ink:#e9eef5;
    --ink-dim:#aab4c4;
    --ink-faint:#6f7c8f;
    --kiln:#d99a3f;
    --kiln-soft:#f0c47e;
    --ai:#2bc8c0;
    --ai-soft:#8fe9e3;
    --kiln-glow: 0 0 0 1px rgba(217,154,63,0.35), 0 8px 24px rgba(217,154,63,0.08);
    --ai-glow: 0 0 0 1px rgba(43,200,192,0.35), 0 8px 24px rgba(43,200,192,0.08);
  }
  *{box-sizing:border-box;}
  html,body{margin:0;padding:0;}
  body{
    background:
      radial-gradient(900px 500px at 85% -10%, rgba(217,154,63,0.10), transparent 60%),
      radial-gradient(700px 500px at -10% 110%, rgba(43,200,192,0.08), transparent 60%),
      var(--bg);
    color:var(--ink);
    font-family:'IBM Plex Sans', sans-serif;
    min-height:100vh;
  }
  /* blueprint grid texture */
  .grid-veil{
    position:fixed; inset:0; pointer-events:none; z-index:0;
    background-image:
      linear-gradient(var(--line-soft) 1px, transparent 1px),
      linear-gradient(90deg, var(--line-soft) 1px, transparent 1px);
    background-size: 42px 42px;
    mask-image: radial-gradient(1200px 800px at 70% 0%, rgba(0,0,0,0.55), transparent 70%);
    opacity:0.6;
  }
  .kiln-bar{
    position:fixed; top:0; left:0; right:0; height:3px; z-index:50;
    background:linear-gradient(90deg, var(--kiln), var(--ai), var(--kiln));
    background-size:200% 100%;
    animation: kilnflow 8s linear infinite;
  }
  @keyframes kilnflow{ 0%{background-position:0% 0%;} 100%{background-position:200% 0%;} }

  .shell{ position:relative; z-index:1; display:flex; min-height:100vh; }

  /* ---------------- SIDEBAR ---------------- */
  .sidebar{
    width:240px; flex:none; position:sticky; top:0; align-self:flex-start; height:100vh;
    background:linear-gradient(180deg, var(--panel), var(--panel-soft));
    border-right:1px solid var(--line);
    display:flex; flex-direction:column; padding:26px 18px;
  }
  .brand{ padding:0 6px 22px; border-bottom:1px solid var(--line); margin-bottom:18px; }
  .brand .mark{
    font-family:'Space Grotesk', sans-serif; font-weight:700; font-size:13px;
    letter-spacing:.14em; color:var(--kiln-soft); text-transform:uppercase;
  }
  .brand .sub{ font-size:11px; color:var(--ink-faint); margin-top:4px; letter-spacing:.04em; }

  nav.navlist{ display:flex; flex-direction:column; gap:3px; flex:1; }
  .navbtn{
    display:flex; align-items:center; gap:10px;
    background:none; border:none; color:var(--ink-dim);
    font-family:'IBM Plex Sans', sans-serif; font-size:13.5px; font-weight:500;
    text-align:left; padding:11px 12px; border-radius:8px; cursor:pointer;
    transition:background .15s ease, color .15s ease;
    letter-spacing:.01em;
  }
  .navbtn .idx{
    font-family:'IBM Plex Mono', monospace; font-size:10.5px; color:var(--ink-faint);
    width:18px; flex:none;
  }
  .navbtn:hover{ background:rgba(255,255,255,0.04); color:var(--ink); }
  .navbtn.active{ background:rgba(217,154,63,0.10); color:var(--kiln-soft); }
  .navbtn.active .idx{ color:var(--kiln-soft); }

  .sidebar-foot{ border-top:1px solid var(--line); padding-top:16px; margin-top:14px; }
  .ai-pill{
    display:flex; align-items:center; gap:8px; padding:9px 11px; border-radius:9px;
    background:rgba(43,200,192,0.09); box-shadow:var(--ai-glow);
  }
  .ai-pill .dot{ width:7px; height:7px; border-radius:50%; background:var(--ai); box-shadow:0 0 8px var(--ai); flex:none; }
  .ai-pill .txt{ font-size:11px; color:var(--ai-soft); line-height:1.35; }
  .ai-pill .txt b{ display:block; color:var(--ink); font-size:11.5px; font-weight:600; }

  /* ---------------- MAIN ---------------- */
  main{ flex:1; min-width:0; padding:34px 42px 70px; max-width:1180px; }

  .view{ display:none; animation: rise .45s ease both; }
  .view.active{ display:block; }
  @keyframes rise{ from{opacity:0; transform:translateY(10px);} to{opacity:1; transform:translateY(0);} }

  .eyebrow{
    font-family:'IBM Plex Mono', monospace; font-size:11px; letter-spacing:.16em;
    text-transform:uppercase; color:var(--kiln-soft); margin:0 0 8px;
  }
  .eyebrow.ai{ color:var(--ai-soft); }
  h1.viewtitle{
    font-family:'Space Grotesk', sans-serif; font-size:30px; font-weight:600; margin:0 0 6px; color:var(--ink);
    letter-spacing:-0.01em;
  }
  p.viewsub{ color:var(--ink-dim); font-size:14.5px; margin:0 0 28px; max-width:640px; line-height:1.55; }

  /* ---- Overview hero ---- */
  .hero{
    display:flex; gap:26px; align-items:center; padding:26px;
    background:var(--panel); border:1px solid var(--line); border-radius:16px;
    margin-bottom:26px; position:relative; overflow:hidden;
  }
  .hero::before{
    content:""; position:absolute; right:-60px; top:-60px; width:220px; height:220px;
    background:radial-gradient(circle, rgba(217,154,63,0.16), transparent 70%);
  }
  .hero-photo{
    width:108px; height:108px; border-radius:14px; flex:none; object-fit:cover;
    border:2px solid var(--kiln); box-shadow:0 10px 30px rgba(0,0,0,0.4);
  }
  .hero-text h2{ font-family:'Space Grotesk',sans-serif; font-size:26px; margin:0 0 4px; letter-spacing:.01em;}
  .hero-text .role{ color:var(--kiln-soft); font-size:14px; font-weight:600; margin-bottom:6px;}
  .hero-text .desg{ color:var(--ink-dim); font-size:13.5px; margin-bottom:8px; }
  .hero-links{ display:flex; gap:10px; flex-wrap:wrap; }
  .chip{
    display:inline-flex; align-items:center; gap:6px;
    font-family:'IBM Plex Mono', monospace; font-size:11.5px; color:var(--ink-dim);
    background:rgba(255,255,255,0.04); border:1px solid var(--line); border-radius:999px; padding:6px 12px;
    text-decoration:none; transition:border-color .15s, color .15s;
  }
  .chip:hover{ border-color:var(--kiln); color:var(--kiln-soft); }

  /* ---- KPI grid ---- */
  .kpi-grid{ display:grid; grid-template-columns:repeat(4,1fr); gap:14px; margin-bottom:30px; }
  .kpi{
    background:var(--panel); border:1px solid var(--line); border-radius:13px; padding:18px 18px 16px;
    border-left:3px solid var(--kiln); transition:transform .18s ease, box-shadow .18s ease;
  }
  .kpi.ai-accent{ border-left-color:var(--ai); }
  .kpi:hover{ transform:translateY(-3px); box-shadow:0 12px 26px rgba(0,0,0,0.35); }
  .kpi .kcat{ font-family:'IBM Plex Mono', monospace; font-size:10px; letter-spacing:.08em; text-transform:uppercase; color:var(--kiln-soft); margin-bottom:6px; }
  .kpi.ai-accent .kcat{ color:var(--ai-soft); }
  .kpi .val{ font-family:'Space Grotesk', sans-serif; font-size:24px; font-weight:700; color:var(--ink); }
  .kpi .val .unit{ font-size:14px; color:var(--ink-dim); font-weight:500; }
  .kpi .lbl{ font-size:12px; color:var(--ink-dim); margin-top:6px; line-height:1.4; }

  .summary-block{
    background:var(--panel); border:1px solid var(--line); border-radius:14px; padding:22px 24px;
    color:var(--ink-dim); font-size:14.5px; line-height:1.7;
  }
  .summary-block b{ color:var(--ink); }

  /* ---- Expertise bar graphs ---- */
  .gauge-grid{ display:flex; flex-direction:column; gap:10px; margin-bottom:30px; }
  .gauge-card{
    background:var(--panel); border:1px solid var(--line); border-radius:12px;
    padding:14px 18px; display:flex; align-items:center; gap:16px;
  }
  .gauge-card .glabel{ font-size:13.5px; font-weight:600; color:var(--ink); width:240px; flex:none; line-height:1.3; }
  .gauge-card .gbar-track{ flex:1; height:10px; border-radius:6px; background:rgba(255,255,255,0.08); overflow:hidden; }
  .gauge-card .gbar-fill{ height:100%; border-radius:6px; width:0%; transition:width 1.1s cubic-bezier(.2,.8,.2,1); }
  .gauge-card .gtag{ font-family:'IBM Plex Mono', monospace; font-size:10.5px; margin-top:0; letter-spacing:.03em; width:128px; flex:none; text-align:right; }
  .gauge-card .gnum{ font-family:'Space Grotesk', sans-serif; font-weight:700; font-size:14px; color:var(--ink); width:30px; flex:none; text-align:right; }

  .ai-panel{
    background:linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(43,200,192,0.10), rgba(43,200,192,0.03));
    border:1px solid rgba(43,200,192,0.35); border-radius:14px; padding:22px 24px;
    box-shadow:var(--ai-glow);
  }
  .ai-panel .tag{ font-family:'IBM Plex Mono',monospace; font-size:11px; letter-spacing:.14em; color:var(--ai-soft); text-transform:uppercase; margin-bottom:8px;}
  .ai-panel h3{ font-family:'Space Grotesk',sans-serif; margin:0 0 8px; font-size:17px; color:var(--ink); }
  .ai-panel p{ color:var(--ink-dim); font-size:14px; line-height:1.65; margin:0; }

  /* ---- Achievements accordion ---- */
  .acc{ border:1px solid var(--line); border-radius:13px; margin-bottom:12px; overflow:hidden; background:var(--panel); }
  .acc-head{
    display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:space-between; gap:12px;
    padding:16px 20px; cursor:pointer; user-select:none;
  }
  .acc-head .htxt{ display:flex; align-items:center; gap:12px; }
  .acc-head .num{ font-family:'IBM Plex Mono',monospace; color:var(--kiln-soft); font-size:12px; border:1px solid var(--line); border-radius:6px; padding:3px 7px; }
  .acc-head .title{ font-family:'Space Grotesk',sans-serif; font-size:15.5px; font-weight:600; color:var(--ink); }
  .acc-head .meta{ font-size:11.5px; color:var(--ink-faint); font-family:'IBM Plex Mono',monospace; }
  .acc-head .chev{ color:var(--ink-faint); transition:transform .25s ease; flex:none; }
  .acc.open .acc-head .chev{ transform:rotate(180deg); }
  .acc-body{ max-height:0; overflow:hidden; transition:max-height .35s ease; }
  .acc.open .acc-body{ max-height:1400px; }
  .acc-body ul{ list-style:none; margin:0; padding:0 22px 18px 22px; }
  .acc-body li{
    position:relative; padding:8px 0 8px 18px; color:var(--ink-dim); font-size:13.8px; line-height:1.55;
    border-top:1px solid var(--line-soft);
  }
  .acc-body li:first-child{ border-top:none; }
  .acc-body li::before{ content:"▸"; position:absolute; left:0; color:var(--kiln); font-size:11px; top:10px; }

  /* ---- Global footprint ---- */
  .footprint-toggle{ display:flex; gap:8px; margin-bottom:18px; }
  .ftbtn{
    font-family:'IBM Plex Mono', monospace; font-size:12px; padding:8px 16px; border-radius:999px;
    border:1px solid var(--line); background:var(--panel); color:var(--ink-dim); cursor:pointer;
  }
  .ftbtn.active{ background:rgba(217,154,63,0.12); border-color:var(--kiln); color:var(--kiln-soft); }
  .fp-view{ display:none; }
  .fp-view.active{ display:block; }
  .tagrow{ display:flex; flex-wrap:wrap; gap:8px; margin-bottom:20px; }
  .tagrow .tag{
    font-family:'IBM Plex Mono',monospace; font-size:11.5px; padding:6px 12px; border-radius:7px;
    background:rgba(255,255,255,0.05); border:1px solid var(--line); color:var(--ink-dim);
  }
  .plainlist{ list-style:none; margin:0; padding:0; display:grid; gap:10px; }
  .plainlist li{
    position:relative; padding:11px 16px 11px 30px; background:var(--panel); border:1px solid var(--line);
    border-radius:10px; font-size:13.8px; color:var(--ink-dim); line-height:1.5;
  }
  .plainlist li::before{ content:"●"; position:absolute; left:13px; top:12px; color:var(--ai); font-size:9px; }

  /* ---- Credentials ---- */
  .cred-grid{ display:grid; grid-template-columns:repeat(2,1fr); gap:12px; margin-bottom:8px; }
  .cred-card{
    background:var(--panel); border:1px solid var(--line); border-radius:11px; padding:14px 16px;
    font-size:13.3px; color:var(--ink-dim); line-height:1.5; display:flex; gap:10px;
  }
  .cred-card .ic{ color:var(--kiln-soft); flex:none; font-size:14px; margin-top:1px; }
  .cred-card.ai .ic{ color:var(--ai-soft); }
  .edu-row{ display:flex; gap:10px; align-items:baseline; padding:10px 0; border-top:1px solid var(--line-soft); flex-wrap:wrap; }
  .edu-row:first-child{ border-top:none; }
  .edu-row .deg{ font-family:'Space Grotesk',sans-serif; font-weight:600; color:var(--ink); font-size:14px; min-width:230px; flex:none; }
  .edu-row .note{ color:var(--ink-faint); font-size:12.5px; flex:1 1 260px; line-height:1.5; }

  /* ---- Contact ---- */
  .contact-grid{ display:grid; grid-template-columns:repeat(2,1fr); gap:14px; }
  .contact-card{
    background:var(--panel); border:1px solid var(--line); border-radius:14px; padding:20px;
    display:flex; flex-direction:column; gap:6px; text-decoration:none; color:inherit;
    transition:border-color .15s, transform .15s;
  }
  .contact-card:hover{ border-color:var(--kiln); transform:translateY(-2px); }
  .contact-card .ctag{ font-family:'IBM Plex Mono',monospace; font-size:10.5px; letter-spacing:.1em; color:var(--ink-faint); text-transform:uppercase; }
  .contact-card .cval{ font-size:15px; font-weight:600; color:var(--ink); }

  footer.pagefoot{ margin-top:36px; padding-top:18px; border-top:1px solid var(--line); color:var(--ink-faint); font-size:11.5px; font-family:'IBM Plex Mono',monospace; }

  @media (max-width: 880px){
    .shell{ flex-direction:column; }
    .sidebar{ width:100%; height:auto; position:relative; flex-direction:row; overflow-x:auto; padding:14px; }
    .brand{ display:none; }
    nav.navlist{ flex-direction:row; }
    .sidebar-foot{ display:none; }
    main{ padding:24px 18px 50px; }
    .kpi-grid{ grid-template-columns:repeat(2,1fr); }
    .gauge-card{ flex-wrap:wrap; }
    .gauge-card .glabel{ width:100%; }
    .gauge-card .gtag{ width:auto; text-align:left; }
    .cred-grid, .contact-grid{ grid-template-columns:1fr; }
    .hero{ flex-direction:column; text-align:center; }
    .hero-links{ justify-content:center; }
  }
</style>
</head>
<body>

<div class="grid-veil"></div>
<div class="kiln-bar"></div>

<div class="shell">

  <!-- ================= SIDEBAR ================= -->
  <aside class="sidebar">
    <div class="brand">
      <div class="mark">Younas Khan</div>
      <div class="sub">Executive Profile · Interactive</div>
    </div>
    <nav class="navlist">
      <button class="navbtn active" data-view="overview"><span class="idx">01</span>Overview</button>
      <button class="navbtn" data-view="expertise"><span class="idx">02</span>Expertise &amp; AI</button>
      <button class="navbtn" data-view="achievements"><span class="idx">03</span>Achievements</button>
      <button class="navbtn" data-view="footprint"><span class="idx">04</span>Global Footprint</button>
      <button class="navbtn" data-view="credentials"><span class="idx">05</span>Credentials</button>
      <button class="navbtn" data-view="contact"><span class="idx">06</span>Contact</button>
    </nav>
    <div class="sidebar-foot">
      <div class="ai-pill">
        <span class="dot"></span>
        <span class="txt"><b>AI Certified · 2025</b>Generative AI App Developer</span>
      </div>
    </div>
  </aside>

  <!-- ================= MAIN ================= -->
  <main>

    <!-- ---------- OVERVIEW ---------- -->
    <section class="view active" id="view-overview">
      <div class="eyebrow">01 · Career Highlights</div>
      <h1 class="viewtitle">Executive Overview</h1>
      <p class="viewsub">Three decades of cement-industry leadership, distilled into one snapshot.</p>

      <div class="hero">
        <img class="hero-photo" src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Younas Khan" />
        <div class="hero-text">
          <h2>Younas Khan</h2>
          <div class="role">Chemical Engineer · Cement Industry Executive · R&amp;D &amp; Quality Innovation Leader</div>
          <div class="desg">Head &amp; Senior Manager QC, Product Development &amp; Cost Optimization, Fauji Cement Co. Ltd. &nbsp;|&nbsp; BSc Chemical Engineering · MS &amp; PhD Engineering Management (Research on LC3 in Progress)</div>
          <div class="hero-links">
            <a class="chip" href="tel:+923008585279">+92 300 8585279</a>
            <a class="chip" href="mailto:Engr.younas123@gmail.com">Engr.younas123@gmail.com</a>
            <a class="chip" href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/younas-khan-80765210" target="_blank" rel="noopener">LinkedIn ↗</a>
            <span class="chip">Pakistan</span>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="kpi-grid" id="kpiGrid"><!-- injected --></div>

      <div class="summary-block">
        <b>Executive summary.</b> Chemical engineer and cement-industry executive with more than 32 years of experience spanning Pakistan, Algeria, and international training across Europe and Asia. Currently Head of QC, Product Development &amp; Cost Optimization at Fauji Cement Co. Ltd., with a track record of double-digit production gains, multi-plant quality-system integration, and the development of more than a dozen specialized cement products for commercial, hydropower, and strategic infrastructure projects. Most recently completed certified training as a <b>Generative AI Application Developer</b>, and is actively applying AI and digital tools to modernize quality and production decision-making.
      </div>
    </section>

    <!-- ---------- EXPERTISE ---------- -->
    <section class="view" id="view-expertise">
      <div class="eyebrow">02 · Core capability</div>
      <h1 class="viewtitle">Expertise Dashboard</h1>
      <p class="viewsub">Proficiency across core domains of career — including a fast-emerging AI capability layered onto deep industrial mastery.</p>

      <div class="gauge-grid" id="gaugeGrid"><!-- injected --></div>

      <div class="ai-panel">
        <div class="tag">AI &amp; Digital Transformation</div>
        <h3>Now building on three decades of industrial mastery</h3>
        <p><b style="color:var(--ink)">Certified Generative AI Application Developer</b> (Aug–Sep 2025) — Pak Angels, iCode Guru &amp; Aspire, Silicon Valley, USA. Now bridging 32 years of deep cement-process expertise with Generative AI and digital tools — applying ERP/SAP fluency and a data-driven QC background to modernize quality analytics, reporting, and decision-making on the plant floor.</p>
      </div>
    </section>

    <!-- ---------- ACHIEVEMENTS ---------- -->
    <section class="view" id="view-achievements">
      <div class="eyebrow">03 · Quantified impact</div>
      <h1 class="viewtitle">Career Achievements</h1>
      <p class="viewsub">Click a category to expand. Every line is a measured outcome, not a duty.</p>
      <div id="accWrap"><!-- injected --></div>
    </section>

    <!-- ---------- FOOTPRINT ---------- -->
    <section class="view" id="view-footprint">
      <div class="eyebrow">04 · Reach</div>
      <h1 class="viewtitle">Global Footprint</h1>
      <p class="viewsub">International training and assignments alongside a national career built across Pakistan's leading cement manufacturers.</p>

      <div class="footprint-toggle">
        <button class="ftbtn active" data-fp="intl">International</button>
        <button class="ftbtn" data-fp="natl">National</button>
      </div>

      <div class="fp-view active" id="fp-intl">
        <div class="tagrow">
          <span class="tag">Pakistan</span><span class="tag">Algeria</span><span class="tag">Denmark</span>
          <span class="tag">Switzerland</span><span class="tag">Holland</span><span class="tag">China</span><span class="tag">Japan</span><span class="tag">USA</span>
        </div>
        <ul class="plainlist" id="intlList"></ul>
      </div>
      <div class="fp-view" id="fp-natl">
        <ul class="plainlist" id="natlList"></ul>
      </div>
    </section>

    <!-- ---------- CREDENTIALS ---------- -->
    <section class="view" id="view-credentials">
      <div class="eyebrow">05 · Standing</div>
      <h1 class="viewtitle">Credentials &amp; Education</h1>
      <p class="viewsub">Certifications, honors, advisory memberships, and academic record.</p>

      <div class="cred-grid" id="credGrid"></div>

      <h3 style="font-family:'Space Grotesk',sans-serif; color:var(--ink); font-size:16px; margin:26px 0 10px;">Education</h3>
      <div id="eduWrap" style="background:var(--panel); border:1px solid var(--line); border-radius:13px; padding:6px 18px;"></div>
    </section>

    <!-- ---------- CONTACT ---------- -->
    <section class="view" id="view-contact">
      <div class="eyebrow">06 · Get in touch</div>
      <h1 class="viewtitle">Contact</h1>
      <p class="viewsub">Open to executive, advisory, and collaborative R&amp;D conversations in cement manufacturing, sustainability, and digital transformation.</p>

      <div class="contact-grid">
        <a class="contact-card" href="tel:+923008585279">
          <span class="ctag">Mobile</span><span class="cval">+92 300 8585279</span>
        </a>
        <a class="contact-card" href="mailto:Engr.younas123@gmail.com">
          <span class="ctag">Email</span><span class="cval">Engr.younas123@gmail.com</span>
        </a>
        <a class="contact-card" href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/younas-khan-80765210" target="_blank" rel="noopener">
          <span class="ctag">LinkedIn</span><span class="cval">linkedin.com/in/younas-khan-80765210 ↗</span>
        </a>
        <div class="contact-card">
          <span class="ctag">Location</span><span class="cval">Pakistan</span>
        </div>
      </div>

      <footer class="pagefoot">EXECUTIVE PROFILE OF YOUNAS KHAN — SENIOR MANAGER &amp; HEAD OF QC/QA, PRODUCT DEVELOPMENT</footer>
    </section>

  </main>
</div>

<script>
// Legacy-engine safety polyfill (no-op in modern browsers)
if (window.NodeList && !NodeList.prototype.forEach) { NodeList.prototype.forEach = Array.prototype.forEach; }
if (!String.prototype.padStart) { String.prototype.padStart = function(len, ch){ let s=String(this); ch=String(ch||' '); while(s.length<len) s = ch+s; return s; }; }

// =====================================================================
// DATA
// =====================================================================
const KPIS = [
  {cat:"Experience", val:"32+", unit:"", lbl:"Years of Cement Industry Experience", ai:false},
  {cat:"Up", val:"50", unit:"%", lbl:"Production Increase Delivered — Beni-Saf Cement, Algeria", ai:false},
  {cat:"Up", val:"30", unit:"%", lbl:"Productivity Increase Delivered — Askari Cement, Nizampur", ai:false},
  {cat:"Quality", val:"9,500", unit:"psi", lbl:"Compressive Strength — up from 7,500 psi, Askari Cement", ai:false},
  {cat:"Local Coal", val:"100", unit:"%", lbl:"Imported Coal Replaced with Local Coal — Billions Saved", ai:false},
  {cat:"", val:"4,050", unit:"TPD", lbl:"Production Capacity Reached (from 3,650 TPD)", ai:false},
  {cat:"QC/QA Integration", val:"4", unit:"", lbl:"Cement Plants Unified Under TQRA & QCMS at FCCL", ai:false},
  {cat:"R&D", val:"12+", unit:"", lbl:"Specialized Cement Products Developed", ai:false},
  {cat:"AI Integration", val:"2025", unit:"", lbl:"Certified Generative AI Application Developer — Silicon Valley, USA", ai:true},
];

const SKILLS = [
  {label:"Cement QC & QA & Production Optimization", level:5, tag:"Expert", ai:false},
  {label:"R&D & New Product Development", level:5, tag:"Expert", ai:false},
  {label:"Alternative Fuels & Sustainability", level:5, tag:"Expert", ai:false},
  {label:"Quality Systems — TQRA, QCMS, ISO", level:5, tag:"Expert", ai:false},
  {label:"Industrial & Operations Management", level:4, tag:"Advanced", ai:false},
  {label:"Budgeting & Project Mgmt. (BMR)", level:4, tag:"Advanced", ai:false},
  {label:"ERP & SAP Digital Systems", level:4, tag:"Advanced", ai:true},
  {label:"Generative AI Application Dev.", level:3, tag:"Emerging · 2025", ai:true},
];

const ACHIEVEMENTS = [
  { title:"Productivity, Quality & Cost Impact", meta:"9 outcomes", items:[
    "Led cement quality optimization at Beni-Saf Cement, Algeria, supporting a 50% increase in production output.",
    "Upgraded Beni-Saf Cement's product classification from EN CEM-I 32.5 to 42.5 through quality improvement.",
    "Drove quality optimization at Askari Cement, Nizampur, supporting a 30% productivity increase.",
    "Improved cement compressive strength from 7,500 psi to 9,200 psi.",
    "Optimized fuel and power consumption KPIs and norms through systematic quality improvement.",
    "Redesigned raw-mix formulation to lift production at Askari Cement, Wah from 3,650 to 4,050 TPD, with major savings in kWh and kcal/kg.",
    "As QC Head, introduced indigenous coal at Askari Cement, Nizampur — eliminating up to 100% of imported coal and saving billions of USD.",
    "As QC Head, introduced high-ash, high-sulphur local coal at Askari Cement, Wah, shifting from imported coal to Afghan coal, then 60% of Afghan coal usage to Pakistani coal.",
    "Conceived and implemented TQRA and QCMS, integrating quality and production norms across four cement plants.",
  ]},
  { title:"Sustainability & Alternative Materials", meta:"6 outcomes", items:[
    "Replaced 60% of quarry limestone with waste stone-crusher dust — environmental gains and significant cost savings.",
    "Replaced 5% clay and 1.5% sand with waste materials in the raw mix.",
    "Replaced 10% clay with siliceous waste material to support sustainable production.",
    "Introduced tire-derived fuel, poultry waste, and canola husk as alternative fuels with the Production Department.",
    "Completed certifications in ISO 14064, 9001, 14001, 45001, 50001, ERP & SAP, plus safety, environment, first-aid, and management training.",
    "Skill Development Council — Total Quality Management.",
  ]},
  { title:"R&D & Product Innovation", meta:"10 outcomes", items:[
    "Leading the R&D for LC3 cement at Fauji Cement Co. Ltd. (FCCL) at corporate level.",
    "Leading R&D on Geopolymer cement and related products.",
    "Leading R&D on Green Modified Portland cement.",
    "Produced specialized Low Heat Cement (ASTM Type-IV) for hydropower projects as per ASTM 1702 Standard.",
    "Led product development and diversification for value addition at Fauji Cement.",
    "Led R&D and product realization for Fauji Tile Bond.",
    "Developed Low Alkali, Low Heat, Sulphate Resisting & Green Cement, meeting EN CEM-II and ASTM standards.",
    "Developed a specialized EN 52.5N cement combining Low Alkali and SRC properties in one product (3-in-1).",
    "Developed ASTM Type-III Rapid Hardening Cement with Low Alkali and low C₃A for strategic projects, including dams and atomic plants.",
    "Developed EN 32.5R low-carbon cement for commercial use with a 65% clinker factor.",
  ]},
];

const INTL = [
  "Cement production training — M/s F.L. Smidth, Denmark (1995).",
  "Quality control training — M/s F.L. Smidth, Denmark, and ARL, Switzerland (1995).",
  "International training seminar on XRF technologies — M/s PANalytical.",
  "Served as Quality Head, Beni Saf Cement, Algeria.",
  "Training and seminar on coal solutions — CKiC, China.",
  "Worked with multinational companies in cement quality and production.",
  "APO Japan trainings on Green Productivity, Sustainability, Quality and advanced industry tools & techniques.",
  "Working relationships with international consultants in dams and hydropower plants.",
  "Certified Generative AI Application Developer training — Silicon Valley, USA (2025).",
];

const NATL = [
  "Career built within leading cement manufacturers, Askari Cement & Fauji Cement (Fauji Foundation, Pakistan) and BeniSaf Cement, Algeria.",
  "Completed dozens of seminars and conferences on cement, fuel, water treatment, quality, management, optimization, and simulation.",
  "Management Representative, QMS, Askari Cement.",
  "Head of Trainees, Internees & Apprentices, Askari Cement.",
  "Successful training programs at SGS Pakistan.",
  "Conducted water treatment and environmental training.",
  "Participated in national conferences on Sustainable Production & Consumption.",
  "Delivered lectures as Invited speaker at national and international conferences.",
  "Management Representative, Askari Cement, for Quality Assurance & Quality Control.",
];

const CREDS = [
  {ai:true, t:"Certified Generative AI Application Developer — Pak Angels, iCode Guru & Aspire, Silicon Valley, USA (Aug–Sep 2025)."},
  {ai:false, t:"Certified Quality Manager — MPO Pakistan & Asian Productivity Organization (APO), Japan."},
  {ai:false, t:"Certified Production Manager — MPO Pakistan & Asian Productivity Organization (APO), Japan."},
  {ai:false, t:"Certified Auditor — ISO 45001 & ISO 9001; basic training for ISO 17025 certification."},
  {ai:false, t:"Member, Higher Education Commission of Pakistan — Technology Development Fund Award Committee for Scientists at Pakistani Universities."},
  {ai:false, t:"Member, PhD Research Evaluation Committee, Department of Chemical Engineering, UET Peshawar, Pakistan."},
  {ai:false, t:"Member, Industrial Advisory Board, Pakistan Institute of Engineering & Applied Studies."},
  {ai:false, t:"Member, Industrial Advisory Board, Pak Austria Fachhochschule Institute of Applied Sciences and Technology."},
  {ai:false, t:"Recipient of multiple cash awards for performance excellence at Askari Cement / Fauji Cement."},
  {ai:false, t:"Keynote speaker at international conferences; industrial expert speaker at educational institutions."},
];

const EDU = [
  {deg:"PhD, Engineering Management", note:"Research — Production & Optimization of Low Carbon Cement (LC3), in progress"},
  {deg:"MS, Engineering Management", note:"Fuel, Project Management, Product Life Cycle Management & Manufacturing Excellence"},
  {deg:"BSc, Chemical Engineering", note:""},
  {deg:"Associate Chemical Engineer", note:""},
];

// =====================================================================
// RENDER: KPIs (with count-up)
// =====================================================================
const kpiGridEl = document.getElementById('kpiGrid');
KPIS.forEach(k=>{
  const el = document.createElement('div');
  el.className = 'kpi' + (k.ai ? ' ai-accent' : '');
  const catHtml = k.cat ? `<div class="kcat">${k.cat}</div>` : '';
  el.innerHTML = `${catHtml}<div class="val" data-target="${k.val}">0<span class="unit">${k.unit}</span></div><div class="lbl">${k.lbl}</div>`;
  kpiGridEl.appendChild(el);
});

function countUp(el){
  const target = el.getAttribute('data-target');
  const numMatch = target.replace(/,/g,'').match(/[\d.]+/);
  const unit = el.querySelector('.unit');
  if(!numMatch){ el.childNodes[0].nodeValue = target; return; }
  const end = parseFloat(numMatch[0]);
  const isInt = !target.includes('.');
  const suffixAfterNum = target.replace(/^[\d,\.]+/,'');
  let startTs = null; const dur = 1100;
  function step(ts){
    if(!startTs) startTs = ts;
    const p = Math.min((ts-startTs)/dur, 1);
    const eased = 1 - Math.pow(1-p, 3);
    let cur = end * eased;
    let txt = isInt ? Math.round(cur).toLocaleString('en-US') : cur.toFixed(1);
    el.childNodes[0].nodeValue = txt + suffixAfterNum;
    if(p < 1) requestAnimationFrame(step);
  }
  requestAnimationFrame(step);
}
document.querySelectorAll('.kpi .val').forEach(countUp);

// =====================================================================
// RENDER: Expertise bar graphs
// =====================================================================
const gaugeGridEl = document.getElementById('gaugeGrid');
SKILLS.forEach((s,i)=>{
  const pct = Math.round((s.level/5)*100);
  const color = s.ai ? 'var(--ai)' : 'var(--kiln)';
  const card = document.createElement('div');
  card.className = 'gauge-card';
  card.innerHTML = `
    <div class="glabel">${s.label}</div>
    <div class="gbar-track"><div class="gbar-fill" data-final="${pct}" style="background:${color}"></div></div>
    <div class="gnum">${s.level}<span style="font-size:11px;color:var(--ink-faint)">/5</span></div>
    <div class="gtag" style="color:${s.ai?'var(--ai-soft)':'var(--ink-dim)'}">${s.tag}</div>
  `;
  gaugeGridEl.appendChild(card);
});
function animateGauges(){
  document.querySelectorAll('.gbar-fill').forEach((bar,i)=>{
    setTimeout(()=>{ bar.style.width = bar.getAttribute('data-final') + '%'; }, i*70);
  });
}

// =====================================================================
// RENDER: Achievements accordion
// =====================================================================
const accWrapEl = document.getElementById('accWrap');
ACHIEVEMENTS.forEach((group, i)=>{
  const acc = document.createElement('div');
  acc.className = 'acc' + (i===0 ? ' open' : '');
  acc.innerHTML = `
    <div class="acc-head">
      <div class="htxt"><span class="num">${String(i+1).padStart(2,'0')}</span><span class="title">${group.title}</span></div>
      <div style="display:flex; align-items:center; gap:14px;">
        <span class="meta">${group.meta}</span>
        <span class="chev">▾</span>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="acc-body"><ul>${group.items.map(it=>`<li>${it}</li>`).join('')}</ul></div>
  `;
  acc.querySelector('.acc-head').addEventListener('click', ()=> acc.classList.toggle('open'));
  accWrapEl.appendChild(acc);
});

// =====================================================================
// RENDER: Footprint lists
// =====================================================================
document.getElementById('intlList').innerHTML = INTL.map(t=>`<li>${t}</li>`).join('');
document.getElementById('natlList').innerHTML = NATL.map(t=>`<li>${t}</li>`).join('');

document.querySelectorAll('.ftbtn').forEach(btn=>{
  btn.addEventListener('click', ()=>{
    document.querySelectorAll('.ftbtn').forEach(b=>b.classList.remove('active'));
    btn.classList.add('active');
    const which = btn.getAttribute('data-fp');
    document.getElementById('fp-intl').classList.toggle('active', which==='intl');
    document.getElementById('fp-natl').classList.toggle('active', which==='natl');
  });
});

// =====================================================================
// RENDER: Credentials + Education
// =====================================================================
const credGridEl = document.getElementById('credGrid');
CREDS.forEach(c=>{
  const el = document.createElement('div');
  el.className = 'cred-card' + (c.ai ? ' ai' : '');
  el.innerHTML = `<span class="ic">${c.ai?'◆':'●'}</span><span>${c.t}</span>`;
  credGridEl.appendChild(el);
});
const eduWrapEl = document.getElementById('eduWrap');
EDU.forEach(e=>{
  const row = document.createElement('div');
  row.className = 'edu-row';
  row.innerHTML = `<span class="deg">${e.deg}</span><span class="note">${e.note}</span>`;
  eduWrapEl.appendChild(row);
});

// =====================================================================
// NAVIGATION
// =====================================================================
const navBtns = document.querySelectorAll('.navbtn');
const views = document.querySelectorAll('.view');
navBtns.forEach(btn=>{
  btn.addEventListener('click', ()=>{
    const target = btn.getAttribute('data-view');
    navBtns.forEach(b=>b.classList.remove('active'));
    btn.classList.add('active');
    views.forEach(v=> v.classList.toggle('active', v.id === 'view-'+target));
    if(target === 'expertise'){ setTimeout(animateGauges, 60); }
    window.scrollTo({top:0, behavior:'smooth'});
  });
});
</script>
</body>
</html>
